info: Motto: ສັນຕິພາບ ເອກະລາດ ປະຊາທິປະໄຕ ເອກະພາບ ວັດທະນະຖາວອນ Santiphap, Ekalat, Paxathipatai, Ekaphap, Vatthanathavon "Peace, Independence, Democracy, Unity and Prosperity"
Anthem: ເພງຊາດລາວ Pheng Xat Lao "Lao National Anthem"
Show globe Show ASEAN Location of Laos (green) in Southeast Asia

^ Including over 100 smaller ethnic groups ^ "The State respects and protects all lawful activities of Buddhists and of followers of other religions, [and] mobilises and encourages Buddhist monks and novices as well as the priests of other religions to participate in activities that are beneficial to the country and people." [ 3 ]
